channel.title: The best vintage and classic cars for sale online | Bring a Trailer
channel.description: Barn finds, rally cars, and needles in the haystack.

item.title: 2004 Porsche Boxster S 6-Speed
item.dc:creator: bringatrailer
item.description: This 2004 Porsche 986 Boxster S is finished in Lagoon Green Metallic over black leather and is powered by a 3.2-liter flat-six paired with a six-speed manual transaxle. The seller acquired the car in 2019, and work since has included installation of an LN Engineering IMS Solution retrofit with an updated rear main seal, a new clutch, and a full service of the AOS and water pump. It now shows 52k miles. Equipment includes 18" Carrera wheels, a Porsche Communication Management head unit, heated seats, xenon headlights, and a wind deflector. This rare-color Boxster S is now offered in California with comprehensive service records, the owner's manual, two keys, and a clean California title.

item.title: 1997 Ford F-250 HD XLT 7.5L 4×4 5-Speed at No Reserve
item.dc:creator: bringatrailer
item.description: This 1997 Ford F-250 HD XLT regular-cab 4×4 pickup is powered by a 7.5-liter V8 linked to a five-speed manual transmission.

item.title: 2013 Porsche Boxster
item.dc:creator: bringatrailer
item.description: This 2013 Porsche 981 Boxster is a base model with the 2.7-liter flat-six and a six-speed PDK dual-clutch transmission.

item.title: 2021 Ferrari Portofino M
item.dc:creator: bringatrailer
item.description: This 2021 Ferrari Portofino M finished in Grigio Titanio over Cuoio leather.
